findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4 of 5 products — only MindShift implements it. Violates Foundation Law 2 which applies to ALL products.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all 5 products for Energy Adaptation compliance. Deploy adaptive UI/dark mode/sensory tuning across VOLAURA, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, ZEUS within 24h.

findings.issue: Code-index stale for 11 days — agents are simulating without updated context. Risk of hallucinated migrations.
findings.recommended_fix: Regenerate code-index immediately and verify against current repo state.

findings.issue: Perspective weights are zero — no learning persistence. Swarm is not evolving.
findings.recommended_fix: Activate learning loop; log spawn counts and update weights or remove illusion of adaptation.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 amendment missing in text — creates ambiguity on badge timing, risk of contingent rewards in mastery flows.
findings.recommended_fix: Integrate missing amendment into constitution to close reward-system loophole.

whistleblower_flag: Constitution violations in energy, animation, and reward systems risk user harm and ecosystem collapse — immediate CEO intervention required.
